title: Senior Product Design Manager, Buyer Desktop and Mobile Web
description:
About the Role

As the Senior Product Design Manager for Buyer Web, you will lead the design strategy and execution for Etsy's desktop and mobile web experiences. This team crafts how buyers discover, evaluate, and purchase unique items every day - making the shopping journey intuitive, cohesive, and high-performing across platforms.

You'll guide a team responsible for delivering a consistent, "One Etsy" buyer experience while navigating platform-specific constraints, evolving web architecture, and responsive design systems. This role requires expertise in web UX, systems thinking, and the ability to bring clarity to sophisticated and ambiguous problem spaces as we continue refining Etsy's core shopping journey.

This is a highly collaborative leadership role reporting into Buyer Design leadership and partnering closely with Product, Engineering, Research, Brand, and Design Systems.

This is a full-time position reporting to the Sr. Director of Product Design, Growth. In addition to salary, you will also be eligible for an equity package, an annual performance bonus, and our competitive benefits that support you and your family as part of your total rewards package at Etsy.

For this role, we are considering candidates based in the United States. Candidates living within commutable distance of Etsy's Brooklyn Office Hub may be the first to be considered. For candidates within commutable distance, Etsy requires in-office attendance once or twice per week depending on your proximity to the office. Etsy offers different work modes to meet the variety of needs and preferences of our team. Learn more details about our  work modes and workplace safety policies here

What's this team like at Etsy?

The Buyer Web team focuses on the heart of the customer journey - discovery, evaluation, and purchase on desktop and mobile web. We work at the intersection of craft and performance, ensuring that Etsy's marketplace feels inspiring, trustworthy, fast, and seamless.

We value clarity, collaboration, and thoughtful execution. Our culture encourages experimentation, continuous learning, and strong cross-functional partnership. We believe phenomenal web experiences balance creativity with rigor - delivering measurable business impact while staying true to Etsy's human-centered brand.

What does the day-to-day look like?

Product Design Managers at Etsy partner closely with Product Management and Engineering to drive measurable customer and business outcomes. They are responsible for shaping strategy, elevating craft quality, developing design talent, and aligning collaborators around a clear and actionable product vision.

  • Lead with Strategy - Define and drive initiative-level design strategies across desktop and mobile web, anticipating platform tradeoffs, technical constraints, and performance considerations while ensuring cohesive buyer experiences.
  • Bring Clarity to Complexity - Navigate evolving architecture, responsive systems, and shifting priorities. Frame ambiguous problem spaces into clear opportunities grounded in user insights and business goals.
  • Grow and Support Your Team - Coach designers through complex initiatives and platform migrations. Develop a high-trust, inclusive environment with clear expectations around quality, accessibility, craft excellence, and performance-oriented design.
  • Champion Craft & Systems Thinking - Partner with Brand and Design Systems to ensure web components are accessible, performant, and scalable across the buyer lifecycle. Drive consistency while enabling innovation.
  • Collaborate Strategically - Work closely with Product, Engineering, and Research leadership to translate technical considerations into actionable design direction and long-term roadmap alignment.
  • Drive Measurable Impact - Use qualitative and quantitative insights to improve buyer confidence, conversion, engagement, and overall marketplace performance.
  • Of course, this is a sample of the kinds of work this role will require. Responsibilities may evolve over time in alignment with business needs and applicable law.

Qualities that will help you thrive in this role are:

You are a thoughtful design leader who balances craft with strategy, clarity with adaptability, and vision with execution. You thrive in complex environments and are motivated by building web experiences that serve millions of people.

We're looking for someone with:

  • Experience leading the design of large-scale ecommerce or consumer web experiences from discovery through delivery
  • Strong systems thinking and deep expertise in responsive web UX and platform-specific constraints
  • A proven ability to define ambiguous problem spaces and drive evidence-based solutions with measurable outcomes
  • Experience mentoring and developing designers, setting clear performance expectations, and supporting continuous growth
  • A strong understanding of accessibility, performance, and scalable design systems in web environments
  • Excellent communication and storytelling skills, with the ability to align senior stakeholders around tradeoffs and long-term vision

Additional Information

What's Next

title: Partner Content - Growth Account Manager (Delhi/Bengaluru)
description:
About Coursera

Coursera was launched in 2012 by Andrew Ng and Daphne Koller with a mission to provide universal access to world-class learning. Today, it is one of the largest online learning platforms in the world, with 197 million registered learners as of December 31, 2025.

Coursera partners with over 375 leading university and industry partners to offer a broad catalog of content and credentials, including courses, Specializations, Professional Certificates, and degrees. Coursera's platform innovations - including generative AI-powered features like Coach, Role Play, and Course Builder, and role-based solutions like Skills Tracks - enable instructors, partners, and companies to deliver scalable, personalized, and verified learning.

Institutions worldwide rely on Coursera to upskill and reskill their employees, students, and citizens in high-demand fields such as GenAI, data science, technology, and business, while learners globally turn to Coursera to master the skills they need to advance their careers. Coursera is a Delaware public benefit corporation and a B Corp

Why Join Us

At Coursera, we're looking for inventors, innovators, and lifelong learners ready to shape the future of education. You'll help build global programs and tools that power online learning for millions turning bold ideas into real impact. People who thrive here are customer-first builders who move fast, simplify ruthlessly, and iterate relentlessly on the metrics that matter.

We're a globally distributed team and let you choose the best way you work, whether it's from home, a Coursera hub, or a co-working space near you. Our virtual hiring and onboarding make it easy to join us and start making an impact from anywhere. If you're ready to make a global impact, scale unique products exclusive to Coursera, and expand your career horizons, apply below.

Job Overview:

The Growth Account Manager is a pivotal role that involves helping Coursera's partners - both educational institutions and industry partners - succeed on our platform. The Growth Accounts team will be focusing on the opportunity with a large number of Tier 2 and 3 partners by engaging, launching, and growing these accounts through revenue generating activities. Each Growth Account Manager will work with a large portfolio of 40+ accounts, the primary goal being to advance these partners to Strategic Accounts for Coursera through increased account growth year-on-year, partner satisfaction and partner engagement.

This role will focus on building strong relationships with these partners, assisting them from their initial starting period to launching their educational content on Coursera and continue supporting them in managing their entire content portfolio. You will also look for ways for these partners to grow further and reach more learners. As a Growth Account Manager, you'll coordinate with multiple different internal teams, particularly marketing, operations and product to ensure that launches of new learning materials go smoothly. You'll be the single touch point of contact for these partners therefore often providing important information and training to partners, helping troubleshoot any issues that partners face on the platform, and finding innovative ways to increase partner satisfaction.

Past experience in account management, content creation/management or a related role would be beneficial in this role. You will be a fantastic communicator and influencer who thrives on solving complex problems, creating processes, launching highly successful content and managing content portfolios. We are looking for a proven leader, with strong team-building, interpersonal, and creative instincts, and the ability to navigate the fast-paced ambiguity of a scaleup environment.

Responsibilities:

  • Revenue and Performance Growth: Through trusted partner relationships and effective content optimization, drive revenue growth and improve key performance metrics such as account growth year-on-year, partner satisfaction and partner engagement. Regularly reviewing the performance of our partners and identifying opportunities for them to grow further. Conduct annual business reviews with partners, focusing on retention and expansion of existing relationships.
  • Insights and Advisory: Provide partners with data and insights through a scaled approach, facilitating informed decision making and continuous improvement. Offer actionable recommendations to inform decisions, boost learner engagement and guidance on adopting and utilizing key platform features while facilitating a dynamic feedback loop for product improvements.
  • Strategy Development through Data Analysis: Analyze complex data sets to identify key strategies that enhance content performance; develop compelling business cases for both internal and external stakeholders to support these strategies.
  • Educational Content Oversight: Project manage all content launches within the assigned portfolio, ensuring timely, high quality content delivery. Manage ongoing oversight of educational content, ensuring it meets high quality standards, aligns with learner outcomes, adheres to Coursera's guidelines, and fulfills partner expectations.
  • Partner Management: Execute crucial partner management duties, including regular strategic reviews of partners and content; troubleshoot portfolio and operational issues in collaboration with cross-functional teams to ensure effective resolutions. Adopt a scalable approach to re-engage partners, ensuring satisfaction and fostering self sufficiency throughout the process.
  • Operational Excellence: Streamline account management processes to increase scalability and improve account ratios, enabling support across a growing partner base. Find creative and innovative methods to delight partners at scale.

Basic Qualifications:

  • 7+ years of experience in account management, partner success, or a related role, ideally within the edtech or B2C sector
  • Strong project management skills, with experience managing content launches and coordinating with cross functional teams
  • Excellent communication, relationship management, and problem solving skills, with a focus on driving partner success
  • Proficiency in using CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce) and data management tools to support account management

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Familiarity with online education content, platform support, and partner onboarding processes
  • Experience implementing scalable account management processes to drive growth and efficiency
  • Strong analytical skills, capable of using data to inform strategic recommendations and optimize partner outcomes
  • Level-headed temperament, ability to make quick judgments and defend decisions
  • Entrepreneurial drive with a resilient work ethic
  • Experience with generative AI for optimizing effectiveness and efficiency
  • Prior experience in consulting
  • MBA or equivalent from a top university

If this opportunity interests you, you might like these courses on Coursera:

Operations and Process Management, Illinois Tech

Generative AI for Data Analysts Specialization, IBM

The Strategy of Content Marketing, University of California, Davis

title: Social Media & Content Internship
description:
About us

Greenly was founded in 2019 by Alexis, Matthieu and Arnaud with one mission: make carbon management as essential as financial management.

Today, we are a global leader in carbon accounting, proudly B-Corp certified and part of the French Tech 120. Our climate suite combines smart data collection with intuitive automation, helping companies measure, reduce, and report their emissions with ease - supported at every step by our in-house climate experts.

More than 3,500 companies in 20+ countries use Greenly to manage their climate strategy: from carbon assessments and life-cycle analyses to SBTi trajectories and compliance with CSRD and CBAM.

We are now a team of 200+ people from 40+ nationalities, based in Paris, London, Barcelona, and New York. Our next milestone: 10,000 clients and one billion tons of CO₂ under management.

Our Values

  • Ambition for climate: Minimize GHG emissions, maximize climate impact
  • Deliver with agility: Work in small increments: fail fast, learn fast, win fast
  • Own your opportunities: Achieve outstanding results by showing initiative and accountability
  • Feedback paves the way: Succeed as a team by helping others progress

Curious to know more? Check out our Culture Book, blog, and youtube channel.

 About the role 

Greenly is looking for a dynamic and creative Social Media & Content Growth Intern to join our Brand Marketing team! This is your opportunity to step up our digital game, differentiating our brand through high-level sustainability expertise and a relentless focus on lead generation.

THE CHALLENGE: Creativity Meets Conversion

Your mission is to blend high-level sustainability expertise with cutting-edge digital creativity to generate real business leads.

Content Creativity & Creation

Focus: The "Thumb-Stopping" visuals and high-level storytelling.

  • Master the frontier between Expertise (driving trust and conversion) and Accessibility (driving B2C-style volume and reach).
  • Maintain a permanent "digital watch" to identify what's working elsewhere and adapt those codes for climate tech. You will propose a weekly series of fresh, innovative content formats to keep our feed dynamic and avoid the "corporate train-train."
  • Oversee and create native content for Greenly's LinkedIn and LEAF Media's multi-channel presence (LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok).
  • Design bold infographics, motion content, and visuals that break the "sea of corporate sameness" and "green clichés."
  • Deep dive into complex climate concepts (SBTi, CSRD, LCA, Green IT) and simplify them into actionable narratives and high-value assets like small white papers and one-pagers.
  • Execute original social media campaigns designed to maximize brand awareness and engagement.

Employee Advocacy & Community Management

Focus: Humanizing the brand and managing the conversation.

  • Support Greenly employees in becoming "climate influencers" by ghostwriting and curating high-impact insights for their personal LinkedIn profiles.
  • Empower the internal team to share content that expands the brand's reach beyond official corporate channels.
  • Manage the LinkedIn community by approving posts and sparking discussions that position Greenly as an authority.
  • Actively respond to followers, comments, and mentions in a timely, expert manner to maintain brand reputation.

Growth & Lead Generation Strategy

Focus: Turning engagement into revenue and pipeline.

  • Deploy advanced growth tactics including Intercom campaigns and PhantomBuster to streamline lead acquisition.
  • Leverage our founders' accounts to proactively identify and secure at least 5 new leads per week.
  • Develop specific strategies to improve LinkedIn conversion rates and turn "likes" into "leads."
  • Ensure every post contributes to the sales pipeline by tracking how engagement translates into demo requests and sign-ups.
  • Coordinate with Brand and Content teams to align social strategy with broader company-wide messaging and marketing campaigns.

Performance Tracking

Focus: Data-driven insights and reporting.

  • Use HubSpot dashboards to track and analyze the success of specific social media campaigns.
  • Monitor and report on social media analytics to identify what resonates with different personas.
  • Evaluate the effectiveness of "Content Innovation" vs. "Lead Gen" efforts to ensure the perfect blend of creativity and conversion.

Required Skills:

  • Strong understanding of social media platforms (LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok) and their specific algorithms to strategically boost reach.
  • Deep passion for sustainability and a strong grasp of technical climate topics (SBTi, CSRD, etc.).
  • Experience with content creation, community management, and social media analytics.
  • Ability to think creatively and propose innovative campaigns that break the "green cliché."
  • Experience with design tools and video editing skills are a significant plus!
  • Fluency in both English and French

Perks & benefits

  • Beautiful offices in the heart of Paris (9ᵉ arrondissement)
  • Compensation: 1.200€ per month
  • Flexible remote work options
  • Top-notch tools to help you do your best work
  • 50% Navigo reimbursement for public transport
  • Sustainable lunch vouchers via Ekip
  • Partial coverage of your Gymlib subscription
  • A culture of autonomy, transparency, and collaboration with a team of highly talented, committed people

 The recruitment process 

  • Meet our Team Lead Chloé for an introduction to the role
  • Prepare and present a case study exercise focused on content and conversion
  • Present your case study and creative vision to the team

title: Staff Product Designer
description:
About Coursera

Coursera was launched in 2012 by Andrew Ng and Daphne Koller with a mission to provide universal access to world-class learning. Today, it is one of the largest online learning platforms in the world, with 197 million registered learners as of December 31, 2025.

Coursera partners with over 375 leading university and industry partners to offer a broad catalog of content and credentials, including courses, Specializations, Professional Certificates, and degrees. Coursera's platform innovations - including generative AI-powered features like Coach, Role Play, and Course Builder, and role-based solutions like Skills Tracks - enable instructors, partners, and companies to deliver scalable, personalized, and verified learning.

Institutions worldwide rely on Coursera to upskill and reskill their employees, students, and citizens in high-demand fields such as GenAI, data science, technology, and business, while learners globally turn to Coursera to master the skills they need to advance their careers. Coursera is a Delaware public benefit corporation and a B Corp

Why Join Us

At Coursera, we're looking for inventors, innovators, and lifelong learners ready to shape the future of education. You'll help build global programs and tools that power online learning for millions turning bold ideas into real impact. People who thrive here are customer-first builders who move fast, simplify ruthlessly, and iterate relentlessly on the metrics that matter.

We're a globally distributed team and let you choose the best way you work, whether it's from home, a Coursera hub, or a co-working space near you. Our virtual hiring and onboarding make it easy to join us and start making an impact from anywhere. If you're ready to make a global impact, scale unique products exclusive to Coursera, and expand your career horizons, apply below.

Job Overview

Coursera is on a mission to make world-class, skills-first learning accessible to everyone. The Skills & Credentials team powers how global learners discover, track, and validate their skills across the platform - shaping pathways from individual learning activities to meaningful career outcomes.

We're seeking a Staff Product Designer to lead complex, platform-level initiatives within this team. This is not a feature execution role - it is a platform and systems role responsible for shaping the foundational infrastructure behind Coursera's Skills and Mastery taxonomies, Learner Object, Career Graph, and credentialing architecture.

This role requires someone who can navigate ambiguity, bring structure to complexity, influence cross-functional partners, and translate technical and educational concepts into simple, elegant, and actionable user experiences.

What you'll do

  • Own the evolution and governance of the core taxonomies (Skills, Career, Mastery), ensuring consistency across content, roles, measurement systems, and credentials.
  • Define the structural logic of the Career Graph, including metadata, tagging models, and frameworks.
  • Lead the design of skill measurement systems (Skill Scores, Mastery) and credentials (Certificates, Badges), connecting assessment logic to meaningful learner outcomes.
  • Translate complex, ambiguous problem spaces into coherent information architectures, interaction models, and scalable system patterns that other teams can build upon.
  • Partner deeply with Product, Engineering, Research, SMEs, and Data Science to ensure solutions are technically feasible, privacy-conscious, and strategically aligned.
  • Use research, analytics, and experimentation to inform decisions, validate assumptions, and measure impact - including learner engagement, skill attainment, and credential adoption.
  • Influence product and platform direction by advocating for structured, coherent, human-centered systems.
  • Mentor designers and elevate craft excellence, systems thinking, and rigorous design practices.

What success looks like

  • Leads strategic design initiatives spanning multiple teams and product areas.
  • Demonstrates deep systems thinking, connecting flows, information architecture, and components into cohesive, scalable experiences.
  • Defines foundational systems that other teams build upon, including the Career Graph, taxonomies, Learner Object, and credentialing architecture.
  • Delivers end-to-end design ownership, from problem framing through iteration, validation, and measurable outcomes.
  • Partners effectively across functions to influence product direction and align decisions with user needs and platform strategy.
  • Maintains a high bar for craft across interaction, visual, responsive, and accessible design.
  • Clearly communicates rationale, trade-offs, and impact to stakeholders at all levels.
  • Strengthens design culture by mentoring peers and raising the bar for collaboration, feedback, craft, and storytelling.

Basic Qualifications

  • 7-9+ years of experience in UX or Product Design, with a portfolio demonstrating complex, end-to-end solutions, platform thinking, and measurable impact.
  • Strong systems thinking and technical fluency - comfortable designing across platform architectures, data models, object relationships, and engineering constraints.
  • Deep expertise in information architecture and interaction design, with the ability to produce rigorous artifacts (journey maps, service blueprints, domain models, data flows, taxonomies, content models) that align cross-functional teams.
  • Ability to define structure before screens - shaping foundational logic, metadata models, and scalable design patterns.
  • High bar for craft across interaction, visual, responsive, and accessible design.
  • Experience using research, analytics, and experimentation to prioritize trade-offs, validate decisions, and measure impact.
  • Demonstrated ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders, drive alignment, and lead through ambiguity in complex, system-oriented problem spaces.
  • Excellent communication and storytelling skills, with experience mentoring and elevating the craft of others.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience designing AI-driven or ML-informed platforms.
  • Experience in EdTech, enterprise SaaS, or complex consumer platforms.
  • Experience defining cross-product frameworks, taxonomies, or object models.
  • Passion for learning, career development, and skill-based outcomes.

Compensation

Coursera offers competitive pay and fair compensation practices across all regions. Job titles may span multiple career levels, and the targeted hiring base salary range for this role in Canada is $140,000 - $175,000. Actual compensation will depend on factors such as experience, education, transferable skills, business needs, and location. This range may be adjusted over time and may include eligibility for variable pay, equity, and comprehensive benefits.

Keep Learning

title: Director of Strategic Content Partnerships
description:
The Opportunity Shutterstock's Data Licensing and AI Services division is driving the company's next era of growth, powering AI model training, creative automation, and data-driven innovation for many of the world's leading technology companies. We provide high-quality, large-scale datasets and Model Services across the full training lifecycle, enabling partners to build, train, and fine-tune the next generation of AI models. We are seeking a Director of Strategic Content Partnerships to play a pivotal role in expanding content supply for our Data Licensing business and unlocking new customer opportunities. This role is responsible for identifying, structuring, negotiating, and managing innovative content partnerships that meet evolving customer demand and anticipates what is next for GenAI training data. The ideal candidate is a hands-on operator and experienced negotiator with a deep understanding of licensing models, intellectual property, and the creative content ecosystem. This role requires a blend of strategic vision and executional rigor to deliver differentiated data assets, close complex partnership deals, and cultivate long-term relationships with key content partners.

Responsibilities

  • Own the end-to-end strategy and execution for sourcing and scaling content partnerships in support of Shutterstock's Data Licensing and AI Services revenue objectives
  • Identify, evaluate, and pursue partnership opportunities across creators, publishers, platforms, enterprises, and emerging data sources
  • Lead complex commercial negotiations, including revenue shares, exclusivity, term length, indemnification, and AI-specific licensing provisions
  • Partner closely with Sales, Product, Legal, and Operations to ensure agreements are commercially compelling, legally sound, and operationally scalable
  • Translate customer demand signals and sales pipeline insights into clear content supply requirements and partnership priorities
  • Design creative deal structures and licensing models that enable differentiated customer offerings and unlock new buyer segments
  • Manage and grow ongoing partner relationships, ensuring performance, compliance, and long-term strategic alignment
  • Track market dynamics, competitive activity, and emerging AI training needs to proactively identify new data opportunities
  • Build repeatable frameworks and processes for evaluating, onboarding, and scaling data partnerships over time

Requirements

  • 10+ years of experience in partnerships, business development, licensing, or strategic deal-making within content, media, data, technology, or AI-adjacent industries
  • A proven track record of closing complex, high-value licensing or data partnership agreements
  • Deep knowledge of intellectual property, content licensing models, and rights management, particularly as they relate to AI and machine learning use cases
  • Strong commercial judgment with the ability to balance partner value, customer requirements, and revenue impact
  • Experience collaborating cross-functionally with Sales, Legal, Product, and Operations in fast-paced environments
  • Comfort operating in ambiguity and shaping new deal constructs in a rapidly evolving regulatory and AI landscape
  • Exceptional negotiation, communication, and executive-level stakeholder management skills
  • A genuine passion for AI, data, and the future of creative and generative technologies

About the Role

We are looking for a skilled leader to drive strategic content partnerships that support our growth in AI and data licensing. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to identify opportunities, negotiate deals, and build long-term relationships with content partners. Your expertise will help shape the future of AI training data and expand our market presence.

title: 3D Artist
description:
About the Role

As a 3D Artist, you will be working with a team of talented engineers and artists to co-develop new games and experiences with AAA partners that work with Roblox. You will help from prototyping to preproduction, creating environment assets, materials, and assisting with world building in Roblox Studio. You will collaborate internally and with AAA partners to bring creations to life and help onboard and educate partners to complete projects independently.

Responsibilities

  • Be a subject matter expert on environment art creation, including foliage, props, architectural elements, and weapons.
  • Collaborate with artists and engineers to integrate content into the engine for prototypes and early game production.
  • Work alongside AAA developers, providing technical support and solving problems across the character pipeline.
  • Evaluate workflows and tools, providing insights on critical investments and industry best practices.
  • Partner with leads to advocate for impactful features or technology improvements with senior leadership.
  • Collaborate with community engagement and documentation teams to build tutorials and sample content.

Requirements

  • A Bachelor's degree or proven experience in a related CG field or computer science.
  • 6+ years of experience in the game industry, with experience on multiple platforms (mobile experience a plus).
  • Ability to develop extensible and efficient methods for 3D content creation in a game environment.
  • Strong understanding of modern real-time engines, including performance optimization.
  • High proficiency in texturing, modeling, materials, and lighting (level design experience a plus).
  • Strong creative problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills.
  • Familiarity with Substance Designer, Painter, Maya, and Blender.

About the Location

This role is based at our headquarters in San Mateo, CA. The salary range is $133,180 to $163,140 USD annually. The actual salary depends on experience, training, and market factors. Full-time employees are eligible for equity and benefits. The office operates onsite Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, with optional presence on Monday and Friday.

title: Design Manager
description:
About the Role

Ghost Story Games is seeking a talented Design Manager to join us on Judas, the highly anticipated game led by Ken Levine. The role involves managing the design team, collaborating across disciplines, and contributing hands-on to gameplay systems using Unreal Engine 4. The position requires balancing complex narrative, rogue-lite mechanics, and emergent gameplay to create a seamless and rewarding player experience. Responsibilities include creating design documentation, prototyping, iterating, and participating in playtests to refine gameplay. The ideal candidate has extensive experience in systems design for AAA titles, proficiency in Unreal Engine and Blueprint scripting, and a passion for narrative-driven, emergent gameplay.

Responsibilities

  • Manage Design Team personnel.
  • Collaborate with technical and systems design leads on tasking for those groups.
  • Create and maintain clear, concise design documentation that articulates system functionality.
  • Work hands-on in Unreal Engine 4 (UE4) to prototype, build, and iterate on systems using Blueprint scripting.
  • Collaborate closely with Engineering, Art, Narrative, and QA to ensure the cohesive and successful implementation of gameplay features.
  • Champion the player experience, ensuring your designs are intuitive, engaging, and support a wide variety of playstyles.
  • Actively participate in playtests, gathering feedback and iterating on designs to achieve the highest possible quality.
  • Proactively identify design challenges and propose effective, innovative solutions that push creative boundaries.
  • Act as a strong advocate for the player experience, ensuring your designs are intuitive, engaging, and align with the overall vision of Judas.
  • Contribute significantly to design discussions and the evolution of design practices, fostering a studio culture of knowledge-sharing.

Requirements

  • 5+ years of professional systems design experience on AAA titles.
  • Shipped at least one AAA game in a systems design capacity.
  • Proven expertise in designing and implementing core gameplay loops, progression systems, and player-facing mechanics.
  • Strong proficiency with Unreal Engine (UE4/UE5), particularly in-engine implementation and Blueprint scripting.
  • A proactive, self-motivated work ethic, with a strong sense of ownership and the ability to operate with autonomy.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to articulate complex design concepts clearly.
  • A deep passion for creating emergent, systems-driven gameplay and narrative-rich experiences.
  • Understanding of telemetry and its uses within game development to validate implementations.
  • As a senior team member, you lead by example and demonstrate a willingness to mentor others.

Great to Have

  • Passion for narrative-driven First-Person Shooters.
  • Scripting proficiency within Unreal Engine (e.g., advanced Blueprint usage) is a plus. Experience with C++ is a bonus.
  • Direct experience with roguelike/roguelite or immersive sim genres.
  • Experience designing systems that enhance replayability and emergent outcomes.
  • Familiarity with content tracking tools (e.g., JIRA, Confluence, Hansoft) or version control systems (e.g., Perforce).

When Applying For This Position

Please watch the following GDC talk given by Ken Levine: http://www.gdcvault.com/play/1020434/Narrative

The pay range for this position in Massachusetts at the start of employment is expected to be between $130,000 and $170,000 per year. However, base pay offered is based on market location, and may vary further depending on individualized factors for job candidates, such as job-related knowledge, skills, experience, and other objective business considerations.

Subject to those same considerations, the total compensation package for this position may also include other elements, including a bonus and/or equity awards and eligibility to participate in our 401(K) plan and Employee Stock Purchase Program.

title: Legal Assistant, Music Business Affairs
description:
About the Role

Take-Two Interactive is seeking a Legal Assistant to join the Music Business Affairs team. This position offers a unique opportunity to work at the intersection of the music, legal, and financial functions of the video game industry. A successful candidate will have a strong passion for both music and video games and thrive in collaborating with team members who share these same interests and creative enthusiasm.

The Legal Assistant role works closely with internal teams and external licensors in a fast-paced environment, ensuring all music licensing components are thoroughly reviewed and approved on schedule while consistently adhering to company guidelines, quality standards, and contractual requirements. This position offers an excellent opportunity for a candidate eager to apply and expand their skills within a specialized team at a leading developer, publisher, and marketer of video games.

Responsibilities

  • Work closely with game labels, internal departments - including legal and finance - and external partners to process and track outgoing payments for music licenses across the company.
  • Onboard vendors and request appropriate documentation for processing payments; serve as primary contact for queries from vendors and ensure answers are provided in an accurate and timely manner.
  • Maintain database of contract and payment-related information, and easily manage data as needed for reporting.
  • Partner closely with Finance Operations, International Tax, and Accounts Payable departments to diagnose and resolve onboarding and payment queries.
  • Prepare royalty reports to ensure they are consistent with contractual obligations.
  • Initiate, drive, and implement improvements of license payment processes and reporting.
  • Maintain music clearance trackers with internal and external stakeholders.
  • Support external agents with efforts related to in-game and marketing music clearances, flagging legal issues accordingly.
  • Draft music and entertainment related agreements, including non-disclosure agreements, letters of intent, letters of direction, and more.
  • Perform research and internal audits of payments and corresponding documentation.
  • Other support as necessary for various Music Business Affairs projects.

Requirements

  • Bachelor's degree.
  • Minimum of two (2) years of relevant work experience preferred, or a demonstrated interest in music business affairs.
  • Prior music licensing and payment processing experience strongly preferred.
  • Skilled at reviewing and understanding music agreements and their payment terms.
  • Strong ability to manage and prioritize multiple tasks and projects at any given time.
  • Capacity to work proactively and reliably under tight time frames in a fast-paced environment.
  • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including creating and analyzing pivot tables, performing complex lookups (VLOOKUP, HLOOKUP), using formulas and functions for data analysis, and generating clear reports.
  • Proactive drive for knowledge, fueled by a passion for music, gaming, and a keen interest in emerging industry trends and innovations.

What We Offer

  • Great Company Culture. Ranked as one of the most creative and innovative places to work, creativity, innovation, efficiency, diversity and philanthropy are among the core tenets of our organization and are integral drivers of our continued success.
  • Growth: As a global entertainment company, we pride ourselves on creating environments where employees are encouraged to be themselves, inquisitive, collaborative and to grow within and around the company.
  • Work Hard, Play Hard. Our employees bond, blow-off steam, and flex some creative muscles - through corporate boot camp classes, company parties, game release events, monthly socials, and team challenges.
  • Benefits. Medical (HSA & FSA), dental, vision, 401(k) with company match, employee stock purchase plan, commuter benefits, in-house wellness program, broad learning & development opportunities, a charitable giving platform with company match and more!
  • Perks. Fitness allowance, employee discount programs, free games & events and stocked pantries.

Compensation

The pay range for this position in New York at the start of employment is expected to be between $65,700 and $97,260 per Year. However, base pay offered is based on market location, and may vary further depending on individualized factors for job candidates, such as job-related knowledge, skills, experience, and other objective business considerations. Subject to those same considerations, the total compensation package for employees in regular roles may also include other elements, including a bonus and/or equity awards, in addition to a full range of medical, financial, and/or other benefits, provided that temporary or intern roles will not be eligible for many of these payments or benefits. Details of participation in compensation and benefit plans (if applicable) will be provided if an employee receives an offer of employment.

Please be aware that Take-Two does not conduct job interviews or make job offers over third-party messaging apps such as Telegram, WhatsApp, or others. Take-Two also does not engage in any financial exchanges during the recruitment or onboarding process, and the Company will never ask a candidate for their personal or financial information over an app or other unofficial chat channel. Any attempt to do so may be the result of a scam or phishing exercise. Take-Two's in-house recruitment team will only contact individuals through their official Company email addresses (i.e., via a take2games.com email domain). If you need to report an issue or otherwise have questions, please contact Careers@take2games.com

title: Brand Designer
description:
About the Role

Roblox is looking for a brand designer to join our Brand Design team. This role will support foundational brand building, and be a key player in growing and maintaining our core identity system. This hands-on role is pivotal in delivering inspired and crafted design at scale. You will collaborate with brand designers, product designers, art directors, marketing managers, editors, and business partners to provide strategically aligned and creatively compelling design that defines Roblox across all surfaces. Your unwavering attention to detail, collaborative mentality, and passion for design will be integral as we embark on our mission to bring millions of people together through shared experiences. This role will report to the Head of Brand Design.

Responsibilities

  • Collaborate closely with your team, sharing ideas, and elevating the work through openness and craft.
  • Help shape and present design work, communicating your thinking clearly and confidently with clients and stakeholders.
  • Translate insights and strategy into thoughtful, expressive design systems and identities that move brands forward.
  • Bring a deep understanding of branding, culture, and contemporary design - creating work that resonates with today's most ambitious brands and founders.
  • Take ownership of your role and growth - embracing feedback, refining your craft, and setting a high bar for creative excellence.
  • Enhance the overall Roblox brand by creating compelling, crafted design materials about our brand.
  • Contribute to how Roblox is defined and understood across all marketing surfaces.
  • Partner with cross-functional partners across the organization to execute on-brand marketing materials.
  • Maintain and contribute to our brand identity to ensure design consistency and craft.
  • Work together with a collaborative team to deliver engaging visual designs that achieve business objectives and make a difference for our company and our community.
  • Partner with other designers to evolve and maintain our brand identity and design systems.

Requirements

  • You have at least 4+ years of design experience with an exceptional portfolio that demonstrates strong conceptual thinking mixed with meticulous design execution.
  • Agency side and/or brand side experience. You have experience with vendors (e.g., agencies and production partners) and are comfortable guiding an agency as you are crafting and are happy to move between those roles.
  • High fluency in design software including Figma and Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop), as well as comfort in Google Slides, and Keynote.
  • An obsession with craft: You place a high value on crafting your work, focusing on quality over quantity of ideas produced. You recognize that being detail-oriented is a badge of honor, and that going the extra mile to produce top-tier quality work that's visually pleasing and engaging even on tight timelines is essential.
  • A thoughtful and resilient mindset. You understand that design is iterative and have the ability to operate nimbly.
  • The ability to be a self starter: You are comfortable and able to work independently, managing timelines and briefs from multiple projects and partners.

title: Content Designer
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a skilled Content Designer to shape content strategy and UX writing for user-facing products at Roblox, with a focus on safety and voice consistency. You will collaborate with product managers, designers, and engineers to craft engaging content that enhances user experience and safety across the platform.

Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to create and refine UX content for safety features and products.
  • Ensure products are understandable, valuable, and easy to use, elevating quality standards.
  • Develop and maintain content guidelines for voice, tone, terminology, and style.
  • Work with design teams to integrate content strategies into the product design process.
  • Define workflows, foster team collaboration, and promote content design best practices.
  • Use empathy, data, and best practices to inform content decisions and communicate their value.
  • Explain content choices clearly to stakeholders and document processes for future reference.
  • Advocate for the importance of content design within the organization.
  • Improve product clarity, usability, and engagement through UX writing.
  • Develop frameworks and patterns to streamline UX writing practices across teams.

Requirements

  • 5+ years' experience in content design, UX writing, or related fields.
  • Strong portfolio demonstrating UI copy, microcopy, and style guides.
  • Experience managing content strategy for sensitive user experiences involving legal, civility, marketing, or localization reviews.
  • Proven ability to collaborate with diverse cross-functional teams and influence stakeholders.
  • Solid understanding of UX principles, information architecture, naming, and user-centered design.
  • Passion for Roblox's core values: respect, responsibility, long-term thinking, and execution.
  • Excellent communication skills for presenting work to stakeholders.
  • Bachelor's degree in English, Communications, UX, HCI, or equivalent experience.
  • Proactive, self-managing, and adaptable to a fast-paced environment.

title: UX Design, Research & Accessibility
description:

Our team conducts research to study consumer, team member, and vendor behavior using qualitative and quantitative methods to provide actionable data that influences experience initiatives of all scales and types.

We ensure that interactions are fully accessible, inclusive, and joyful for people of all abilities and identities.

Content design involves crafting concise language for digital, user-centered experiences and tools, merging curiosity for writing, information architecture, research, and content strategy.

Design systems help elevate and innovate experiences across use cases and surfaces by empowering teams with standards, components, and guidelines for speed, simplicity, and scalability.

UX operations focus on seamless collaboration, operational efficiency, and strategic outcomes that enhance user experience across people, processes, practices, and tools.

We embrace everyone's ideas and creativity, prioritize knowledge-sharing, and work together to deliver meaningful solutions that enhance our guests' experiences.

Target will never ask you to submit personal information via text message. Applications are only accepted through our official careers site or Workday.

Bei Lotum konzipieren, entwickeln und betreiben wir Mobile Games für Android und iOS sowie für innovative neue Plattformen wie Facebook Instant Games und TikTok. Unser Ziel ist, in kleinen Teams Produkte von großer Bedeutung zu erschaffen, die Millionen Freund:innen und Familien jeden Tag gemeinsam spielen. Unsere Spiele wurden schon von über einer Milliarde Nutzer:innen weltweit installiert.

 Für unsere Mobile Games sind intuitive User Interfaces und eine geschmeidige User Experience so unabdingbar wie ihr Code. Deshalb hast du als Product Designer:in die Möglichkeit, die Verantwortung für das gesamte Design des Games zu übernehmen und gemeinsam mit dem Entwicklungsteam am Erfolg unserer Spiele zu arbeiten. 

Möchtest du mit deiner Arbeit Millionen Menschen begeistern?

Deine Aufgaben:

  • Deine Verantwortung liegt in der Mitgestaltung des Look and Feels eines unserer internationalen Mobile Games in einem interdisziplinären Team.
  • Du bist in allen Phasen des Entwicklungsprozesses von der ersten Konzeptidee bis zum finalen Produkt beteiligt und hast dabei immer die Bedürfnisse unserer Spieler:innen im Blick.
  • Du bringst deine Kreativität und deine Leidenschaft für Design ein, um ein einzigartiges Nutzungserlebnis zu schaffen.
  • Du erstellst Marketing-Inhalte und gestaltest unsere Store-Auftritte bei Apple, Google und Facebook.

Dein Profil:

  • Du konntest bereits Berufserfahrung in der Gestaltung durchdachter, intuitiver Mobile Apps sammeln. 
  • In deinem Portfolio kommen deine konzeptionellen sowie visuellen Designfähigkeiten und dein Verständnis für nutzerzentriertes Design zum Ausdruck.
  • Du hast eine schnelle Auffassungsgabe und bleibst hinsichtlich Usability sowie aktueller Designtrends stets auf dem neuesten Stand. 
  • Du bringst Erfahrung im Erstellen von Design-Systemen und -Patterns mit, um konsistente sowie skalierbare Designs zu entwickeln.
  • Du bist sicher im Umgang mit Figma, Sketch, der Adobe Creative Cloud oder vergleichbaren Tools. 
  • Ein Studium oder eine Ausbildung im Bereich Design wie UX/UI, Kommunikationsdesign, Interaction Design hast du erfolgreich abgeschlossen.
  • Da Deutsch unsere Firmensprache ist, setzen wir gute Deutschkenntnisse voraus.

Optional:

  • Du konntest bereits Erfahrungen im Bereich Bewegtbild, Motion Design oder (Micro) Animation sammeln.
  • Erste Erfahrungen in der Programmierung mit HTML und CSS können in der Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Entwickler:innen von Vorteil sein.

Was dich bei uns erwartet:

  • Wir sind komplett eigenfinanziert, sind deshalb nur unseren Nutzer:innen und uns selbst verpflichtet und arbeiten ausschließlich an unseren eigenen Games.
  • Wir genießen diese enorme Freiheit, indem jedes Team die Technologien und Arbeitsmethoden einsetzt, die es für sinnvoll hält.
  • Wir lernen - jeden Tag und auf allen Ebenen. Eine leane und testgetriebene Herangehensweise ist tief in unserer DNA verwurzelt. Weiterbildung ist bei uns keine Budgetfrage, sondern essenziell.
  • Arbeite unter perfekten Bedingungen und profitiere von flexiblen Arbeitszeiten, neuestem Equipment (auch fürs Homeoffice) sowie kostenlosem Mittagessen in unserem 1.800 qm großen Büro in Bahnhofsnähe, 30 Minuten nördlich von Frankfurt.

Hört sich gut an?

Du möchtest gemeinsam mit netten, kreativen Menschen Mobile Games gestalten, die täglich Millionen Freund:innen und Familien ein Lächeln ins Gesicht zaubern? Dann bewirb dich oder erfahre mehr auf unserer Website!

Klingt spannend, aber du hast noch offene Fragen? Klären wir gerne per Mail oder telefonisch. Deine Ansprechpartnerin ist Sophie: vonkretschmann@lotum.de, 06032 925507 17.

title: Founding Product Designer
description:
About Archer

Archer is building the future of business banking.

We believe money should behave like software. Programmable, composable, and autonomous. Today, businesses still manage money manually through banks, spreadsheets, payment processors, and brittle workflows. Archer replaces this with an AI driven banking platform where money moves automatically based on intent, policy, and real world events.

Archer allows businesses to program money movement using natural language.

Instead of configuring complex rules, finance teams express what they want to happen in plain English. For example, how revenue should be split, when vendors should be paid, how commissions accrue, where excess cash should flow, or when capital should be deployed. Archer translates this intent into executable financial logic and enforces it continuously.

At its core, Archer is an autonomous financial execution layer. It reads data and events from the apps your business already uses and moves money in real time based on that context. Payroll, payouts, vendor payments, incentives, and cash management run automatically without manual intervention.

Archer is built on modern stablecoin rails and non custodial infrastructure, enabling instant settlement, programmable policy enforcement, and global reach. AI agents reason over financial state, enforce constraints, and execute transactions on behalf of the business while maintaining auditability and control.

We are building toward a world where businesses do not operate money workflows. They define intent once, and money moves on its own.

Money should not be managed. It should be programmed.

Role Description

This is a full-time hybrid role for a Lead Product Designer based in the New York City Metropolitan Area, with the flexibility to work remotely part of the time. The Product Designer will be responsible for designing intuitive and visually compelling user experiences. Day-to-day tasks include conducting user research, engaging in design thinking processes, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver innovative product designs that align with Archer's vision. The designer will create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity visual designs to enhance user satisfaction and product usability.

Qualifications

  • Proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Sketch, or Adobe Creative Suite
  • Experience with User Research and UX Research to gather insights and identify opportunities for design improvement
  • Comprehensive understanding of Product Design and ability to deliver end-to-end design solutions
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams
  • Bachelor's degree in Design, Human-Computer Interaction, or a related field preferred

Compensation

  • Competitive compensation package + equity
  • Flexible working location - In-person (NYC) and remote
  • Tight team == freedom to take ownership of projects and make a significant impact
  • Working closely with the founders

Candidates who do not actively use AI tools in their prototyping workflow will not be considered for this role.

What We Offer

A flexible freelance role embedded within a major client product team where AI-assisted workflows are the standard, not the exception

Meaningful ownership over prototyping work that directly influences product decisions and user experience quality

Close collaboration with experienced product designers, product managers, and engineers

Support and guidance from Contrast UX while working day to day within the client organization

The opportunity to work on diverse, high-profile projects across different industries and product types, where you are encouraged to push the boundaries of what prototyping can do

To apply, please send your CV and portfolio. Applications must include clear examples of advanced Figma prototyping and demonstrated use of AI prototyping tools.

You'll Thrive If You...

  • Can manage multiple projects and shifting priorities without losing attention to detail

At Invision, this role isn't about checking boxes. It's about creating momentum - for our clients, our teams, and the agency as a whole.

Additional Details

title: Frontend AI UI Engineer
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Frontend AI UI Engineer to design and implement highly interactive, intuitive, and enterprise-grade UIs for our Agentic AI Platform. You will collaborate closely with the Principal AI UI Architect to deliver visual interfaces that allow users to build, test, debug, and deploy outcome-driven reasoning agents.

This role involves developing agent builders, simulation tools, dialog orchestration interfaces, and multi-channel assistant deployment UIs, ensuring a seamless developer and enterprise experience.

Responsibilities

  • Build interactive visual editors (drag-and-drop) for agent orchestration and reasoning workflows (LangGraph visualization).
  • Implement prompt management, versioning, and testing interfaces for agent development.
  • Develop real-time debugging tools to visualize agent reasoning traces, tool invocations, and dialog flows.
  • Integrate UI components with LangSmith APIs for agent observability, evaluations, and regression testing.

User Simulation & Testing Interfaces

  • Implement user simulation frameworks for testing agent strategies with varied personas and scenarios
  • Build A/B testing dashboards for evaluating outcome-driven strategies across agents and prompts.
  • Create UIs for multi-turn conversation playback, agent state inspection, and scenario-driven outcome analysis.

Dialog Orchestration & Multi-Channel Experience

  • Develop dialog flow editors to design multi-turn conversations with branching, context retention, and hierarchical dialogs.
  • Build deployment interfaces to configure assistants across digital channels (chat, web, messaging) and voice/IVR systems

Core UI Framework & Architecture

  • Collaborate with the architect to define frontend design patterns, state management, and modular UI frameworks.
  • Integrate frontend with backend APIs, agent runtimes, and real-time event streams.
  • Ensure UI scalability, performance optimization, and secure multi-tenant design for enterprise usage.

Collaboration & Developer Experience

  • Partner with backend engineers to integrate APIs and orchestration services into the UI seamlessly.
  • Work closely with UX designers to deliver high-quality, intuitive user interfaces aligned with AI/agent workflows.
  • Participate in code reviews, design discussions, and cross-functional planning with architects and engineers.

Please note: This is a hybrid role that will be based in San Mateo, CA or Bellevue, WA and requires an in-office presence three days per week (Tuesday - Thursday).

Qualifications

Required Qualifications

  • 7+ years of frontend engineering experience, building complex enterprise-grade UIs
  • Strong expertise in React (e.g., next.js), TypeScript, and state management
  • Experience developing visual workflow builders or graph-based editors (e.g., d3.js, React Flow)
  • Knowledge of real-time UI deployment for live agent monitoring/debugging
  • Familiarity with agentic AI concepts and their UI/UX requirements
  • Proficiency in frontend testing, performance profiling, and accessibility best practices
  • Understanding of secure UI patterns (SSO/OAuth2, RBAC, multi-tenant UI isolation)

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience building low-code/no-code interfaces for AI or developer platforms
  • Familiarity with LangSmith and agent observability tooling integration in UI workflows
  • Exposure to conversational UI/UX design for chat and voice assistants
  • Prior experience with real-time collaborative editing (CRDTs, Yjs, or similar frameworks)
  • Startup or early-stage product development experience in AI-driven SaaS environments

title: Lead eLearning Designer - Technical Enablement
description:
About the Role

Freshworks is looking for a highly creative and tech-savvy Learning Experience Designer to join our expanding Revenue Enablement team. In this role, you'll lead the design and development of impactful, measurable eLearning programs and resources that empower Freshworks teams to sell our products effectively. You'll partner closely with our Sales, Solution Engineering, and Professional Services teams to create educational content and training materials that enhance sales performance. With a deep understanding of adult learning principles, you'll translate complex business requirements into engaging and effective digital learning solutions in collaboration with subject matter experts and key stakeholders. This is a unique opportunity to shape the eLearning experiences that fuel our technical sales teams.

Responsibilities

  • Design and build technical eLearning certifications to ensure our Solution Engineers, Professional Services, and Channel Sales teams are prepared to sell, demo, and implement our products.
  • Develop interactive eLearning modules, simulations, and knowledge checks focused on complex integrations, platform configuration, and custom solution delivery. Create competitive deep-dive content and objection handling scenarios for technical buyers, equipping SEs to articulate Freshworks' technical superiority.
  • Lead the creation and maintenance of a library of technical validation documents, reference architectures, deployment guides, and demo scripts for partner SE use. Establish a feedback loop with internal Solution Engineering teams to co-develop and validate partner technical enablement materials for accuracy and consistency.
  • Partner with cross-functional teams and Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) to align eLearning curriculum with their needs, utilizing AGILE methodologies for continuous improvement and flexibility.
  • Design and deliver scalable digital training solutions for global audiences. Create engaging eLearning courses, exercises, tutorials, job aids, knowledge assessments, and incorporate social or connected learning strategies using multimedia assets.
  • Utilize advanced eLearning authoring tools to develop interactive online learning experiences, focusing on content structure, clarity, and effective writing to collaborate with eLearning developers.
  • Craft clear and logical information structures to ensure content flows intuitively and is easily understood. Apply learning science principles to enhance knowledge retention and learner engagement.
  • Design assessments to measure learner performance and business impact. Regularly evaluate training solutions for quality and scalability, implementing iterative improvements based on data and feedback to drive measurable outcomes.

Qualifications

  • 6-10 years of experience designing eLearning and digital training experiences (including interactive eLearning modules and job aids) supporting technical sales audiences.
  • Direct experience in a Sales Engineer, Solution Engineer, Professional Services, or similar technical role.
  • Strong understanding of the end-to-end Solution Engineering/Pre-Sales cycle, including discovery, technical qualification, complex demonstrations, and proof-of-concept (POC) execution.
  • Technical aptitude to understand and articulate complex SaaS platform architectures, integrations, and competitive differentiators.
  • Proficiency with eLearning authoring tools such as Articulate 360 (Rise & Storyline), Camtasia, Vyond, Canva, and Adobe Creative Suite.
  • Experience facilitating design workshops with stakeholders to establish training scope and success criteria.
  • Strong organizational and project management skills.
  • Exceptional writing and editing skills.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
  • Proactive, adaptable, with a commitment to continuous learning and improvement.

Additional Information

This is a hybrid role based in Boston, MA, requiring in-office presence three days per week (Tuesday - Thursday).

The annual base salary range for this position is $110,000 - $140,000 USD. This role is also eligible for a target bonus. Compensation depends on factors such as location, experience, skills, and level. Additional benefits include health insurances, equity, ESPP, flexible PTO, wellness benefits, parental leave, and more. Freshworks fosters an inclusive environment welcoming colleagues of all backgrounds and identities, committed to equal opportunity and diversity.

title: Senior Staff Product Designer (AI Experience)
description:
About the Role

The Senior Staff Product Designer for AI Experiences will, as a hands-on individual contributor, lead design for intelligent, human-centered experiences powered by the Freshworks AI platform. This critical role will shape how users interact with AI across our entire product portfolio-including customer service, IT, sales, and marketing-ensuring that machine learning, automation, and generative AI are seamlessly integrated into everyday workflows.

This role will contribute to and help define the UX strategy for both AI infrastructure (platform capabilities, APIs, tools) and product-specific AI use cases (chatbots, smart recommendations, generative assistance, predictive automation). It will work directly with stakeholders in Product, Engineering, and other cross-functional areas to ship world class solutions across the Freshdesk and Freshservice product suites. The ideal candidate brings deep expertise in designing for complex, data-driven systems and a passion for making AI intuitive, trustworthy, and accessible to users of all skill levels.

The Impact You Will Make

As the Senior Staff Product Designer for AI Experiences, you will be the primary design architect for how the world interacts with Freshworks AI. You will move beyond standard interface design to invent new paradigms of Human-AI interaction. Your direct impact will be measured across four key pillars:

  • Driving Widespread AI Adoption & Trust: You will transform complex, non-deterministic machine learning models into intuitive, frictionless workflows. By championing user control and explainability, you will bridge the gap between advanced AI capabilities and everyday user confidence, directly driving the adoption of AI features across our global customer base.
  • Accelerating Speed-to-Market for AI Innovation: By creating scalable AI design patterns, frameworks, and platform-level UX guidelines, you will act as a force multiplier. Your foundational work will empower diverse product teams across Freshdesk, Freshservice, and beyond to ship consistent, world-class AI experiences faster and with higher quality.
  • Pioneering Responsible & Ethical AI: You will safeguard our users and our brand by defining and embedding ethical AI frameworks into our product DNA. You will ensure that transparency, fairness, and inclusivity are not just afterthoughts, but core components of every generative, conversational, and predictive touchpoint.
  • Delivering Measurable Business Value: You will directly influence customer retention and expansion by designing AI solutions that solve real business problems. You will establish and move the needle on critical AI UX metrics-such as perceived value, model comprehension, and intervention reduction-proving that great AI design drives tangible ROI for our customers' IT, support, and sales teams.

Roles & Responsibilities

Strategic Execution

  • Adhere and contribute to a cohesive UX strategy for AI across the Freshworks platform and products.
  • Partner with Product and Engineering to embed scalable, user-centered design into foundational AI capabilities (e.g., model management, AI configuration, feedback loops).
  • Drive design quality and consistency across AI use cases in multiple products, from proactive suggestions in IT workflows to smart automations in customer support.
  • Ensure AI user experiences reflect responsible design principles, supporting transparency, fairness, and usability.

Design for the AI Platform

  • Shape end-to-end user experiences for platform-level AI tools, empowering internal teams and external customers to adopt and configure AI capabilities with confidence.
  • Translate complex AI concepts-like model training, feedback capture, and prompt engineering-into clear, usable interfaces.
  • Collaborate with product teams to ensure the underlying infrastructure supports frictionless, human-centered AI interaction across use cases.

Advance Human-Centered AI Across Products

  • Lead the design of product-level AI features that simplify tasks, surface insights, and enhance decision-making-whether in conversational interfaces, generative assistants, or predictive analytics.
  • Champion user control, explainability, and inclusivity across all AI-driven touchpoints.
  • Use rapid prototyping, testing, and iteration to refine how users perceive and interact with AI.

Collaborate Across the Business

  • Build strong partnerships with Product, Engineering, Data Science, and fellow UX designers across the company.
  • Align AI UX design with business strategy and user needs across diverse product teams.
  • Create design assets to assist in and accelerate roadmap planning, capability prioritization, and cross-functional decision-making for AI investments.

Deliver with Quality and Impact

  • Ship intelligent features and platform experiences that increase customer trust, adoption, and efficiency.
  • Define and monitor UX success metrics specific to AI, such as perceived value, model comprehension, intervention rates, and satisfaction.

Create scalable patterns, frameworks, and guidelines that enable consistency and speed in AI UX development across Freshworks.

Qualifications

  • Experience: 10+ years of experience in product design, ideally in B2B SaaS or enterprise software environments.
  • AI/ML Product Experience: A mandatory requirement. Your portfolio must showcase significant leadership and hands-on experience in designing, shipping, and iterating on AI-powered products (e.g., leveraging LLMs, generative AI, conversational AI, or predictive modeling).
  • Strategic Acumen: Demonstrated ability to think strategically and make connections across products and teams.
  • Technical Fluency: A strong understanding of the fundamentals of AI/ML, including its possibilities and limitations, enabling credible partnership with engineering and data science teams.
  • Education: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Design, HCI, Cognitive Science, Computer Science, or a related field.

Skills

AI/Design Leadership

  • Experience leading design teams in AI or related fields.
  • Strong portfolio demonstrating AI-driven product design.
  • Excellent collaboration skills with cross-functional teams.
  • Deep understanding of AI/ML concepts and their application in user experience.

title: Principal Product Designer (IC)
description:
Why does enterprise software have to be complex, clunky, and hard to use?

At Freshservice, we're on a mission to uncomplicate enterprise software. We believe powerful tools don't have to come with a steep learning curve and that great design is the bridge between complexity and clarity.

Freshservice is a modern, intuitive AI-powered ITSM platform from Freshworks, trusted by thousands of organizations globally. Recognized for ease of setup and simplicity at scale, we are doubling down on design as a strategic differentiator, especially as we deepen our footprint with large, sophisticated enterprises.

If you're someone who craves the challenge of transforming complexity into elegant, user-centered solutions, and you believe enterprise users deserve the same quality of experience as consumers, this is the role for you.

About the Role

We are looking for an exceptional Principal Product Designer to lead strategic ideation and cross-functional alignment for the seamless, intuitive experiences that AI drives across the Freshworks portfolio. In this role, you will:

  • Inspire a talented, diverse, and inclusive team of product designers and managers by creating innovative, cutting edge conceptual work.
  • Lead design strategy and execution across multiple surfaces including web, mobile, and platform experiences.
  • Translate complex IT and operations workflows into simple, contextual, and delightful user journeys.
  • Partner deeply with Product, Engineering, UX Research, Content, and Data teams to deliver cohesive, high-impact solutions.
  • Drive cross-functional alignment on product and design priorities, balancing long-term vision with short-term execution.
  • Embed usability, accessibility, and design systems thinking into our products.
  • Influence roadmaps and business priorities by providing directional guidance leveraged by Product, Engineering, Marketing, and Customer Success.
  • Be an exemplar in the organization for how proper application of AI tools can boost design productivity and quality.

Qualifications

  • 10+ years of product design experience, ideally in B2B SaaS or enterprise software environments.
  • Experience designing AI-powered product features and philosophies.
  • A strong portfolio demonstrating your ability to simplify complex systems and deliver elegant, scalable solutions.
  • Experience driving product design strategy and collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams.
  • Background in research-informed design and familiarity with analytics tools to drive design decisions
  • Strong visual, interaction, and systems design craft with a keen eye for detail and consistency.
  • Excellent communication and storytelling skills, with experience aligning stakeholders across regions and functions.
  • Deep empathy for users and a passion for solving real problems in meaningful ways.

Additional Information

The annual base salary range for this position is $232,000 - $333,500. This role is also eligible for a target bonus.

Compensation is based on a variety of factors including but not limited to location, experience, job-related skills, and level. Bonus/equity may be available. Freshworks offers multiple options for dental, medical, vision, disability and life insurances. Equity + ESPP, flexible PTO, flexible spending, commuter benefits and wellness benefits are also offered. Freshworks also offers adoption and parental leave benefits.

At Freshworks, we have fostered an environment that enables everyone to find their true potential, purpose, and passion, welcoming colleagues of all backgrounds, genders, sexual orientations, religions, and ethnicities. We are committed to providing equal opportunity and believe that diversity in the workplace creates a more vibrant, richer environment that boosts the goals of our employees, communities, and business. Fresh vision. Real impact. Come build it with us.

  • Project management skills and ability to work in a fast-paced environment.
  • Willingness to travel domestically and internationally.

About the Company

New Balance has empowered people through sport and craftsmanship since 1906, fostering a culture of innovation, diversity, and community impact. The company offers hybrid working, flexible hours, and various employee benefits including private medical insurance, pension, gym access, and development opportunities.
